fields.name: Name
fields.title: Task Name
fields.description: Name of the task in airflow dag and it should be unique in the dag.

fields.name: ClusterId
fields.title: Cluster Id
fields.description: If Cluster Id is empty, step try to pick the cluster id from previous create emr node(task).

fields.name: deploy-mode
fields.title: Deploy Mode
fields.description: Whether to deploy your driver on the worker nodes (cluster) or locally as an external client (client)

fields.name: files
fields.title: Files
fields.description: Comma-separated list of files to be placed in the working directory of each executor.

fields.name: conf
fields.title: Configuration
fields.description: Arbitrary Spark configuration property in key=value format. Multiple configurations should be passed with comma separation. (e.g. <key>=<value>,<key2>=<value2>)

fields.name: class
fields.title: Class
fields.description: The entry point for your application (e.g. org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi)

fields.name: applicationJar
fields.title: Application Jar
fields.description: Path to a bundled jar including your application and all dependencies.
